description: Use this API to modify the dynamic simulation solution parameters (except the channel output filename) in dynamics working memory (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, activity ALTR). This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = dynamics_solution_param_2(intgar, realar)

parameters.name: intgar
parameters.description: An array of eight elementsNone. (input; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of eight elementsNone. (input; unchanged by default).

intgar.description: network solution maximum number of iterations.
number of channels being monitored; must be less than or equal to the number of output channels defined.
number of state variables in use in the simulation model; should not normally be changed by the user.
next available location in the CON array.
next available location in the STATE array.
next available location in the VAR array.
next available location in the ICON and CHRICN arrays.
next available location in the channel arrays.

realar.description: acceleration sfactor used in the network solution.
convergence tolerance used in the network solution.
filter time constant used in calculating bus frequency deviations.
intermediate simulation mode time step threshold used in extended term simulations.
large (island frequency) simulation mode time step threshold used in extended term simulations.
large (island frequency) simulation mode acceleration factor used in extended term simulations.
large (island frequency) simulation mode convergence tolerance used in extended term simulations.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
